kickoff_budget_note: Within the default AGENTS.md low-risk budget: 4 completed tasks, retrieval-owned paths only, no shared or integrator-locked edits, and required local gates rerun before handoff.
roadmap_items: Milestone 4: Retrieval Layer -> FTS-first ingestion/index path for context/vault documents
scope_completed: This commit updates the handoff artifacts only. It records that the reviewed retrieval implementation lives in 36893f06df85409c4595d64adb8af60455c086a6, that the deferred-policy boundary lives in dc8f79e4abeb30de51854fdd84d35b97993955b8, and that 203906231e9c47371b6d7bc4028bc4f60e764581 does not add retrieval code changes. scope_goal: Document the retrieval handoff boundary while keeping the current commit strictly limited to docs-only handoff alignment.
